CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 63048973) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUENSALIDO, GUILLERMA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 10.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GUILLERMA BUENSALIDO'S MOTION FOR JUDICIAL APPROVAL OF PAGA SETTLEMENT. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. DENIED. PLAINTIFF ASSERTS, "THIS IS NOT A REPRESENTATIVE CASE. INSTEAD, PLAINTIFF, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF ALONE PRESENTED A PAGA CAUSE OF ACTION" FOR WRONGFUL TERMINATION. (MEMO. AT 1; SEE ALSO ID. AT 5 ["THE COMPLAINT IN THIS MATTER IS LIMITED TO PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIM. . . . PLAINTIFF SIMPLY DOES NOT ALLEGE REPRESENTATIVE CLAIMS, NOR DOES SHE SEEK PENALTIES ON BEHALF OF OTHER EMPLOYEES."]; FIRST AM. COMPL. 181 ["PLAINTIFF BRINGS THIS CAUSE OF ACTION ON BEHALF OF HERSELF . . ."].) (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MAY SUBMIT A REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON THE 13TH CAUSE IF ACTION AND THE COURT WILL SIGN IT. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT) ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)
ORDER ALLOWING PLAINTIFF TO DISMISS 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION IN FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (PAGA) WITHOUT PREJUDICE
